  /tmp/scratch-venv/bin/pip download --no-deps -d . "cryptography==$v" >/tmp/dl2_$v.log 2>&1
done
python3 -c "
import zipfile, glob
seen=set()
for whl in sorted(glob.glob('cryptography-*.whl')):
    z = zipfile.ZipFile(whl)
    for n in z.namelist():
        if n.endswith('METADATA'):
            content = z.read(n).decode()
            lines=[l for l in content.splitlines() if l.startswith('Requires-Dist: cffi')]
            print(whl, '->', lines)
"
